channel.title: Distributed-Systems on Loop & Retry
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Systems on Loop & Retry

item.title: Distributed retry patterns: bounding blast radius across a fleet
item.description: A per-step retry cap bounds a step. It never bounds a run, and it never bounds a fleet — twelve workers each retrying ‘reasonably’ is how you turn one bad deploy into a bill. The four patterns that actually put a ceiling on what a fleet of agents can spend recovering from a failure: shared retry budgets, circuit breakers, decorrelated backoff, and poison quarantine.
